display.purpose: Brand moments and page headlines only.

body.purpose: All product UI, forms, list rows, and explanatory copy.

label.purpose: Form labels, compact metadata, and restrained uppercase section labels.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Standard product containers and repeated list surfaces.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Button, chip, color, and press feedback.

motion.name: state-medium
motion.purpose: Card hover and compare selection arrival.

motion.name: landing-reveal
motion.purpose: Landing page reveal only. Disable for reduced motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary product action for forms, programme flows, and committed navigation.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0f766e; color: #faf9f6; border: 1px solid #0f766e; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #115e59; border-color: #115e59; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f3f1ec, 0 0 0 4px rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.35); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary product action where the user needs a lighter choice.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #faf9f6; color: #115e59; border: 1px solid #99f6e4; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f0fdfa; color: #134e4a; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f3f1ec, 0 0 0 4px rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.35); }

components.name: Search Field
components.description: Default product search or filter field.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 4px; font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #57534e; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-field input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid #99f6e4; border-radius: 8px; background: #faf9f6; color: #0f172a; padding: 12px; font: 400 16px/1.4 Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #14b8a6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(45, 212, 191, 0.45); }

components.name: Active Chip
components.description: Selected filter or active compact state.
components.css: .ds-chip-active { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; background: #0f766e; color: #faf9f6; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Default product container for lists and compact panels.
components.html:
Programme title

University and field metadata sit here.
components.css: .ds-card { border: 1px solid #ccfbf1; border-radius: 16px; background: #faf9f6; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04), 0 8px 24px -4px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08); font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #0f172a; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0; color: #134e4a; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.35; font-weight: 700; } .ds-card p { margin: 8px 0 0; color: #57534e; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Mobile Nav Item
components.description: One of five primary mobile destinations.
components.html: Home
components.css: .ds-mobile-nav-item { display: inline-flex; min-height: 52px; min-width: 64px; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 4px; color: #57534e; text-decoration: none; font-family: Figtree, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; transition: background-color 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-mobile-nav-item svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; } .ds-mobile-nav-item:hover { background: #f5f5f4; color: #115e59; } .ds-mobile-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f3f1ec, 0 0 0 4px rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.35); }

narrative.overview: Thuto is a focused student utility for Botswana university decisions. It should feel warm, trustworthy, and practical, with expressive brand moments kept away from dense product tasks.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper surfaces with restrained teal action states.
Figtree carries product UI; Literata is reserved for brand and page headings.
Mobile exposes five primary destinations and moves secondary tools into the drawer.
Motion supports state, never page-load theater.

rules.name: The Teal Earns Its Place Rule
rules.body: Use teal for actions, active states, focus, and trusted status, not as decoration on every card.

rules.name: The Display Is Rare Rule
rules.body: Literata belongs to brand moments and page titles. Dense product UI uses Figtree.

rules.name: The Border Before Shadow Rule
rules.body: Prefer border and tonal contrast at rest. Add shadow when a surface floats, sticks, or responds to interaction.

dos: Do keep product screens search-first and task-first.
Do use teal for primary actions, selected navigation, focus, and meaningful state.
Do preserve reduced-motion behavior for all imperative scrolls and animated reveals.
Do use skeleton states for content loading where lists or panels are expected.
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders wider than 1px as card accents.
Don't default to glassmorphism or blurred cards for product UI.
Don't make users wait through decorative page-load choreography in the app.
